tasks.name: Performance defaults pass + clamp audit
tasks.scope: Measurement pass (not optimization pass) across the 10 settings clamps documented in the M35 plan doc §4.2 table. Seed Strategia-X demo company with realistic content (50 tickets / 10 projects / 2 goals / 5 vault files). Run one full copilot analyzer tick against local Ollama + llama3.1:8b AND a canned provider. Record wall-clock for each. Move defaults ONLY if measurement justifies it; every change lands with a one-line comment in apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts citing the measurement. Unit tests: 4 (settings defaults match measurement-justified values / clamps unchanged / copilot_interval_minutes restart-on-change still fires / any revised default passes both lower and upper clamp).

tasks.name: Cross-milestone E2E — RAG → NLU → agentic → planner → copilot
tasks.scope: NEW apps/desktop/e2e/phase-5-integration.spec.ts. Single spec stitching the full Phase 5 stack in one Playwright session. Scenario per M35 plan doc §4.1: vault upload (M28 on-write chunker+embedder) → Cmd+K complex_request (M30 NLU → M31 agentic loop with M29 RAG retrieval) → Cmd+K 'decompose X into tickets' (M32 write-side gate + decompose_project + delegate_subtask) → copilot.configure manual tick (M33) → Cmd+Shift+K sidebar + insight card + dismiss + ask input (M34). Runtime budget ≤15s. Uses the four-member canned-seam quartet. No changes to production code — purely additive test.
tasks.commitTemplate: test(m35): M35 T2 — cross-milestone integration E2E spec

tasks.name: Observability polish — Audit view chip coverage audit
tasks.scope: Phase 5 added 15 new event types; AuditView ships chips for only 6 (M32 T6 planner chips). T3 audits the remaining 9 (`rag.index.*`, `command.executed`, `agent.step`, `agentic.completed`, `agentic.failed`, `copilot.analyzed`, `copilot.insight`, `copilot.dismissed`, `copilot.expired`) and adds chips + payload-aware row summaries. Match the existing chip a11y contract: semantic color paired with text label, chip focus ring visible, aria-label with event type name. 3 unit tests for representative rendering (rag.index.indexed / agent.step / copilot.analyzed).
tasks.commitTemplate: feat(m35): M35 T3 — audit view chips for Phase 5 events

tasks.name: Phase 5 retrospective doc
tasks.scope: NEW docs/plans/2026-04-19-team-x-phase-5-retrospective.md. Locked 6-section structure per M35 plan doc §4.5: (1) What we shipped (M28–M34 one-liners) / (2) What went well (canned test seam quartet + {rows, truncated} envelope + data-* selector + pause-aware wrapper + AbortController stop + is_system filter-sweep + atomic+ledger cadence + ABI rebuild dance) / (3) What cost us time (Vitest/Playwright ABI dance + sqlite-vec extension load path + FTS5 regression + malformed tool-call parser nudge-retry + F1/F2/F3/F4 follow-ups) / (4) What we deferred (insight export / multi-company aggregation / drag-to-reorder / capabilities frontmatter / post-launch feedback loop) / (5) Metrics (test growth 612→1145 / E2E 4→11 / LOC delta / invariant count 10→11) / (6) Phase 6 seeds (cross-company rollups / proactive copilot autonomous action / agent-to-agent negotiation / real customer demo). 0 tests.

current.asOfMilestone: M34 complete + M35 T0 shipped (commit da4ce1f)

notes: M35 T0 (plan doc) SHIPPED 2026-04-19 commit da4ce1f. Plan doc docs/plans/2026-04-19-team-x-phase-5-m35-demo-hardening.md (186 lines) covers all Phase 5 design §9 M35 deliverables + Phase 5 exit gate.

Phase 5 exit strategy: M35 is the only unshipped Phase 5 milestone. 11 tasks total (T0 done). After T10 lands, Phase 5 is COMPLETE and v1.1.0 ships. Next session is Phase 6 T0 (write Phase 6 plan doc — scope TBD).

Zero new IPC / bus events / providers / migrations across M35. Purely integration hardening + performance measurement + documentation + release marker. Renderer-only and main-only edits are all additive.

M35 restores the per-task atomic + ledger commit cadence (M34 deviated with a squashed feat commit covering T2–T10 + separate T11 docs commit). M35 T1–T10 each land as their own atomic commit with a matching chore(loki) ledger commit fold.

Verification recipe at T10: (1) Node ABI rebuild, (2) pnpm test → ~1145, (3) pnpm typecheck → clean, (4) pnpm lint → 0 errors / ≤24 warnings, (5) Electron ABI rebuild, (6) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e → 11/12 in ≤35s, (7) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop build, (8) pnpm dist:win smoke-launch against release/1.1.0/ installer.

Risk watch: (a) T1 measurement may justify no default changes — that is a valid outcome and T1 ships with unchanged defaults + evidence in comments. (b) T2 E2E may exceed 15s budget — that signals a canned seam doing real work; diagnose, do not widen the budget. (c) T8 version bump must also audit for any hardcoded '1.0.0' outside package.json (docs, comments, strings) — the pnpm dist:win smoke-launch verifies the installer version externally.
